product_overview: SamiGen is a web platform for managing an industrial product master catalog and automatically generating technical documentation such as labels and specification sheets. It centralizes product data, applies configurable naming and translation rules, and exports documents in bulk using template-driven rendering.
core_goals: Centralize product, family, color, client, and reference data in one catalog
Create new products with automatic SKU parsing and bilingual naming support
Design and manage reusable document templates with dynamic data bindings
Generate and export technical documents for filtered product sets in bulk
Review and resolve incomplete products before document generation
Maintain supporting configuration data such as rules, glossary terms, colors, and datasets

features.name: Authentication
features.description: Allow users to sign in with email and password before accessing the application.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Enter email -> Enter password -> Submit the login form -> See the dashboard
Navigate to /login -> Enter invalid credentials -> Submit the login form -> See an authentication error message

features.name: Dashboard
features.description: Provide a central landing page with system status, key metrics, recent activity, and quick access to main modules.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> View KPI cards for products, pending items, templates, and generated documents -> View recent product activity -> Open a quick link to a module
Navigate to / -> Review the dashboard metrics -> Use a quick link to continue into another workflow

features.name: Product Creation
features.description: Create a new product from a parsed SKU and generate its naming data in Spanish and English.
user_flows: Navigate to /products/new -> Enter SKU code -> Review parsed family, reference, version, and color values -> Adjust product attributes -> Review the generated Spanish product name -> Translate to English -> Save the product
Navigate to /products/new -> Enter SKU code -> Review parsed values -> Fill optional product attributes -> Save the product

features.name: Family Management
features.description: Search, select, and mass edit product families, including schema attributes and product lines.
user_flows: Navigate to /families -> Search families by code, name, line, or zone -> Select multiple families -> Apply a mass update -> Review the updated families
Navigate to /families -> Search for families -> Select families -> Add a JSONB schema attribute across the selection -> Confirm the change
Navigate to /families -> Search for families -> Select families -> Remove a JSONB schema attribute across the selection -> Confirm the change

features.name: Template Builder
features.description: Create and maintain document templates using a visual drag-and-drop editor with dynamic field bindings.
user_flows: Navigate to /templates/builder -> Create a new template -> Set the name, dimensions, and orientation -> Drag elements onto the canvas -> Resize and position the elements -> Bind element data fields -> Save the template
Navigate to /templates/builder -> Open an existing template -> Add or reposition elements on the canvas -> Update element properties such as font and color -> Save the template
Navigate to /templates/builder -> Create a template -> Set template dimensions in millimeters -> Bind elements to dataset variables -> Save the template

features.name: Document Generation and Export
features.description: Filter products, preview a selected template, and generate documents for bulk download.
user_flows: Navigate to /generate -> Select a family filter -> Select a reference filter -> Type a search query -> Choose a template -> Select products -> Generate documents -> Review progress -> Download the ZIP file
Navigate to /generate/[id] -> Open a single product preview -> Review the live template rendering -> Return to bulk generation
Navigate to /generate -> Apply product filters -> Select and unselect products -> Choose a template -> Export documents in bulk -> Download the generated files

features.name: Pending Validation Report
features.description: Review products that are missing required data before export.
user_flows: Navigate to /pending -> View products with pending issues -> Review severity badges and reason codes -> Open a product for editing
Navigate to /pending -> Scan the incomplete products list -> Identify items with critical issues -> Continue to the relevant product edit workflow

features.name: Mass Product Import
features.description: Import products from Excel or CSV using a preview-and-confirm workflow.
user_flows: Navigate to /products/mass-import -> Upload a base Excel file -> Preview the proposed import changes -> Confirm execution -> Review the import results
Navigate to /products/mass-import -> Download the filled template -> Populate product data offline -> Upload the completed file -> Preview the diff -> Execute the import

features.name: Glossary Manager
features.description: Maintain the bilingual glossary used by the translation engine.
user_flows: Navigate to /configuration/glossary -> View glossary terms -> Add a term with Spanish and English values -> Set category and priority -> Save the term
Navigate to /configuration/glossary -> View a term list -> Edit an existing term -> Toggle the active state -> Save changes
Navigate to /configuration/glossary -> View glossary terms -> Delete a term -> Confirm removal

features.name: Color Manager
features.description: Maintain the SAP color code catalog used by product records.
user_flows: Navigate to /configuration/colors -> View the color list -> Add a new color code and SAP name -> Save the color
Navigate to /configuration/colors -> Select an existing color -> Edit its details -> Save changes
Navigate to /configuration/colors -> Select a color -> Delete it -> Confirm removal

features.name: Client Management
features.description: Maintain private label clients and associate them with logos.
user_flows: Navigate to /configuration/clients -> View the client list -> Add a new client with a logo -> Save the client
Navigate to /configuration/clients -> Select a client -> Edit client details -> Save changes

features.name: Configuration Hub
features.description: Manage system-wide naming rules and access specialized configuration editors.
user_flows: Navigate to /configuration -> Review system rules sorted by type and priority -> Create a new naming rule -> Save the rule
Navigate to /configuration -> Review existing rules -> Edit a rule -> Save changes
Navigate to /configuration -> Review existing rules -> Delete a rule -> Confirm removal
Navigate to /configuration -> Toggle mass import safety settings -> Continue with another configuration task

features.name: Reference Editor
features.description: Apply mass updates to product references and their JSONB attributes.
user_flows: Navigate to /configuration/reference-editor -> Search references by family code -> Select multiple references -> Update reference fields and JSONB attributes -> Confirm the mass update
Navigate to /configuration/reference-editor -> Search references -> Select references -> Add an attribute key -> Save the change
Navigate to /configuration/reference-editor -> Search references -> Select references -> Remove an attribute key -> Confirm the update

features.name: Datasets
features.description: Import external CSV or Excel datasets and link them to templates.
user_flows: Navigate to /datasets -> Upload a CSV or Excel file -> Configure the column schema mapping -> Preview the imported rows -> Save the dataset
Navigate to /datasets -> Open the dataset import flow -> Review the imported data -> Link the dataset to a template through the wizard

features.name: Asset Library
features.description: Manage multimedia assets, browse categorized galleries, and run smart association tools for isometrics.
user_flows: Navigate to /assets -> Upload a file with a name and type classification -> View the asset in the gallery -> Edit its metadata -> Save changes
Navigate to /assets -> Browse categorized tabs for icons, logos, and isometrics -> Search or filter assets -> Open an asset -> Delete it -> Confirm removal
Navigate to /assets -> View isometric groups by reference -> Run smart association suggestions -> Review the suggested matches

routes.description: Dashboard with system KPIs, recent activity, quick access modules
Supabase email/password authentication
Pending validation report for incomplete products
Family management with mass editor
Create new family form
Product catalog listing (redirects to /)
Create new product with SKU parsing and naming rules
View and edit product by ID
CSV/Excel mass product import
Template dashboard with CRUD actions
Visual drag-and-drop template builder
Document generation - filter products, select template, bulk export
Single product preview with interactive template rendering
Minimal headless render page for Puppeteer capture
External dataset management - import CSV/Excel custom data sources
Centralized multimedia asset library with smart isometric features
Configuration hub with rules table, nomenclatures, mass import settings
Family management (config alias)
Mass editor for product reference attributes
Mass editor for product version attributes
Mass editor for SKU attributes and barcodes
Bilingual glossary editor for translation engine
Global version rules (MRH/GVR) management
SAP color code CRUD manager
Private label client management

features.name: Dashboard
features.description: Central landing page showing system KPIs and quick access modules
user_interactions: View KPI cards (total products, pending count, active templates, generated docs)
Click quick-link cards to navigate to modules

features.name: Login
features.description: Supabase email/password authentication
user_interactions: See error message on invalid credentials

features.name: Product Creation
features.description: Create new products with automatic SKU parsing, naming rules, and bilingual translation
user_interactions: Select family, reference, version, color from parsed values

features.name: Template Builder
features.description: Visual drag-and-drop designer for document templates with element binding
user_interactions: Create new template with name, dimensions, orientation
Configure element properties (data field, font, size, color)
Bind elements to dataset schema variables

features.name: Document Generation and Export
features.description: Filter products, bind templates, preview and bulk export documents as PDF/PNG/JPG via Puppeteer
user_interactions: Type search query for product name/color
Preview individual product with live template
Click export button for bulk PDF/PNG/JPG generation

features.name: Family Management
features.description: Mass editor for family properties, JSONB schema attributes, and product lines
user_interactions: Search families by code, name, line, zone
Apply mass updates to selected families
Add/remove JSONB schema attributes across families

features.name: Reference Editor
features.description: Mass editor for product reference attributes with JSONB atomic mutations
user_interactions: Update normal columns and JSONB ref_attrs

features.name: Asset Library
features.description: Centralized multimedia repository with upload, gallery, smart isometric association
user_interactions: Upload files with name and type classification
View gallery with categorized tabs (icons, logos, isometrics)

features.name: External Datasets
features.description: Import CSV/Excel custom data sources with schema configuration and template linking
user_interactions: Link dataset to template via wizard

features.name: Configuration Hub
features.description: Central rules management and system configuration
user_interactions: View all system rules sorted by type/priority

features.name: Pending Validation Report
features.description: Validation engine detecting products with incomplete data before export
user_interactions: View table of products with pending issues
Click product links to navigate to edit
View reason codes for each issue

features.name: Mass Product Import
features.description: Bulk import products from CSV/Excel with preview, diff, and safe execution
user_interactions: Preview import changes with diff display

features.name: Glossary Manager
features.description: Bilingual dictionary (Spanish/English) for the translation engine
user_interactions: Add new term with Spanish and English translation

features.name: Color Manager
features.description: CRUD for SAP color codes used in product catalog
user_interactions: Add new color (4-digit code + SAP name)

features.name: Client Management
features.description: Private label client management with logo association
user_interactions: Detect missing clients from product catalog

known_limitations.issue: AiAssistantPanel component is not implemented (placeholder TODO)
known_limitations.impact: AI assistant panel in product editing is non-functional

known_limitations.issue: Dashboard KPI for generated docs is hardcoded to 48
known_limitations.impact: Number does not reflect actual generated document count

known_limitations.issue: System asset names array is hardcoded in generate actions
known_limitations.impact: Asset names cannot be configured without code changes

known_limitations.issue: Default client names hardcoded as fallback
known_limitations.impact: Clients list has static fallback values

known_limitations.issue: dbQuery uses custom string interpolation instead of parameterized queries
known_limitations.impact: Potential SQL injection risk (low, as queries use trusted inputs)

known_limitations.issue: Products listing page immediately redirects to dashboard
Prisma targets SQLite but production uses Supabase PostgreSQL
known_limitations.impact: Prisma is used only for type generation, not actual ORM operations

known_limitations.issue: Native confirm() dialog used instead of custom UI component
